title: 6" Elegant Iris Ceramic Fruit Basket with Detachable Wooden Handle,Candy Dish,Decorative Bowl,Flower Girl Basket,Kitchen & Dining Table Office Decor(Black)
features: Size:This fruit bowl measures 6 inches in diameter, with a capacity of approximately 1000 milliliters (33.8 fluid ounces) and weighs around 640 grams (1.41 pounds),ideal for holding fresh fruits,holiday candies,or decorative filler.
Suitable Spaces:The elegant botanical candy bowl adapts seamlessly to any space - living room, dining area, study, bedroom, or garden sanctuary.

Exquisite Decorative Accent:Enhancing any environment with vibrant sophistication while maintaining perfect harmony with diverse interior styles.Transitional matte-gloss finish bridges farmhouse charm and contemporary minimalism.

Easy to Wash:The small fruit plate is made of high-quality ceramics, with a smooth surface that is easier to clean and less prone to dust. It is a beautiful household item and also a high-end decoration

Ideal Gift:This exquisite small gift basket as an ideal choice for conveying heartfelt wishes to loved ones during festive occasions.For example, Christmas gifts for women, Easter basket gifts, Mother's Day gifts, bridal gifts, and new home fruit basket gifts.
description: Product Name: Elegant Iris-Embellished Ceramic Fruit Bowl with Wooden Handle ﻿ Description: Elevate your dining and decor experience with our exquisitely crafted Iris-Embellished Ceramic Fruit Bowl, a harmonious blend of artistry and functionality. Designed to captivate and impress, this premium fruit bowl features a timeless iris floral motif, vibrant hues that evoke the delicate beauty of a blooming garden. Paired with a sleek, natural wooden handle, it effortlessly combines rustic charm with modern elegance, making it a stunning centerpiece for any occasion. Artisanal Floral Design Premium Materials: Made from high-fired ceramic for durability and a smooth, easy-to-clean surface. The handle is crafted from sustainably sourced hardwood, sanded to a silky finish for a comfortable grip. Versatile & Functional: Ideal for displaying fresh fruits, artisanal breads, or gourmet snacks. Its generous size (approx. diameter) accommodates ample servings while maintaining a lightweight design. Decorative Statement: A versatile decor piece for kitchens, dining tables, coffee bars, or as a tasteful accent on shelves and countertops. Thoughtful Gift Option: Presented in a sleek, eco-friendly gift box, it’s perfect for housewarmings, weddings, or anyone who appreciates refined home accessories. Care Instructions: Hand-wash ceramic body with mild soap; avoid abrasive cleaners. Wipe wooden handle with a damp cloth and dry immediately to preserve its finish. Why Choose This Bowl? This isn’t just a fruit bowl—it’s a celebration of craftsmanship and nature’s beauty. Whether hosting a brunch, enhancing your daily routine, or gifting a loved one, the Iris-Embellished Ceramic Bowl promises to add sophistication and warmth to every space.
